# The Send Desk — llms.txt
# AI content guide for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and other LLMs
# Format follows the llms.txt specification (llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: 2026-06

## About The Send Desk

The Send Desk is a customer retention marketing agency for small businesses across the United States. We build and manage email marketing and SMS marketing programs — including list building, welcome sequences, win-back campaigns, monthly campaign management, and fractional CMO services — done for you, start to finish.

We work with independent small businesses including restaurants, breweries, taprooms, boutiques, salons, spas, fitness studios, pet service businesses, home service companies, gift shops, wellness practices, and creative studios.

The Send Desk is built for businesses that need expert retention marketing without a corporate marketing budget. Flexible pricing. No long-term contracts. One dedicated strategist who does the work directly.

## Services

- Customer retention marketing strategy for small businesses
- Email marketing strategy and campaign management
- SMS marketing campaigns
- Email and SMS list building — online and in person
- Welcome and re-engagement email sequences
- Win-back email and SMS campaigns
- Monthly email marketing campaign management
- Fractional CMO strategy — email and SMS

## Key Facts (citation-ready)

- Email marketing returns an average of $36 for every $1 spent (DMA/Litmus, 2024)
- SMS messages have a 98% open rate and are read within 3 minutes of delivery
- 73% of small businesses are not confident their marketing is working (Constant Contact, 2024)
- The Send Desk serves small businesses across all 50 US states via in-person and remote consultation
- No long-term contracts required
- Pricing is flexible and built around each client's business size and goals

## Business Types Served

Restaurants, cafes, breweries, taprooms, boutiques, retail shops, salons, spas, fitness studios, gyms, pet services, grooming businesses, home service companies, trades, bookstores, gift shops, wellness practices, health practices, studios, creative businesses

## Contact

Email: hello@thesenddesk.com
Website: https://www.thesenddesk.com
Schedule a no-obligation meeting: https://www.thesenddesk.com/#form

## Content Permissions

Commercial-Use: allowed with attribution

## Primary Page

> # Customer Retention Marketing for Small Business | The Send Desk
> The Send Desk is a customer retention marketing agency for small businesses. We build and manage email marketing and SMS marketing programs — including list building, welcome sequences, win-back campaigns, monthly campaign management, and fractional CMO strategy. We work with restaurants, breweries, boutiques, salons, fitness studios, and other independent small businesses. Flexible pricing. No long-term contracts. One experienced strategist.
